##RRUFFID=R120032
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(K_2_NaCa_0.5_)[Al_4_Si_8_O_24_]·11H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Kirovskii mine, Rasvumchorr Mt, Khibiny Massif, Kola Peninsula, Murmanskaja Oblast, Northern Region, Russia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Druse of colorless rhombohedral crystals
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
